contexts.context: ...excepting old Acasto, and his young daughter, <mark>Serina</mark>,4 this may be said to every personage...
...him, "an ungrateful ruffian"7 —and for having made <mark>Serina</mark> so sudden in her love, and so unabashed...
...is a young soldier and Monimia's brother with whom <mark>Serina</mark> falls in love. Back
